creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
I dave done build tests with 0.9.6.1 on all ports that I found which depend on vobject and at least building was fine. I also did runtime tests with www/radicale2 so it seems to be okay for me.

Ports I did build:
deskutils/conduit
deskutils/gcalcli
finance/trytond28_calendar
finance/trytond28_party_vcarddav
textproc/translate-toolkit
www/py-caldav
www/pycarddav
www/radicale2 (2.1.10)
